text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon following a long day of work, I return to my room, only
to realize something was amiss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was right on my collar, as per regulations... Did I drop it
somewhere? I'd better find it, quickly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I search frantically for my badge up and down the entire campus, but
no luck...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it fell through a crack or something, I wonder, as my eyes
strain to scan the ground.
Oof!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Forgive me! Are you all right? I hope you've suffered no injury.
choice_data_list:
I should be the one to apologize. I wasn't
looking...

I should be the one to apologize. I wasn't
looking...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Please, we are both unharmed, and that is all that matters! But say...
you've the look of someone in a terrible predicament.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I watched as you stared so bleakly at your feet. Might you be in
search of some precious family heirloom?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell the kind student how I lost my trainer badge and can't find it
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Your trainer badge! This is more dire than I feared.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No outsider is permitted to set foot on the grounds of Tracen
Academy. Without your insignia, the guards may mistake you for a
trespasser...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Have you not heard the tales? There once was a scoundrel prowling
the school under the cover of night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
With not a soul to trouble them in the dark, quiet halls, the villain
chuckled in victory.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But just then, they heard it. The clip-clop of approaching footsteps... They turned around to suddenly see the wicked grin of... Tazuna!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I only kid!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wise trainer, why not try checking your pockets?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strange suggestion takes me by surprise, but I reach into my
pockets all the same...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd only just picked it up off the floor, but to think I would meet its
owner so soon. What luck!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Judging by your frightened panic and lack of badge, I surmised it to
be yours... How right I was!
choice_data_list: But when did you put it in my pocket?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When I bumped into you. Sleight of hand is a useful skill of mine! Heh
heh, were you shocked?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should have simply handed it over, rather than scare you. I
couldn't help but take the chance for a fun surprise... Forgive me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's it! To make up for my devilish trick, let me treat you to a
meal. You're sure to be delighted!
choice_data_list: I really should be thanking you though...
I really should be thanking you though...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All the thanks I need is for you to accompany me for a meal! Now, to
the cafeteria, my dear trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Pray tell. Have you heard the news? There are special items on the
menu today—bread of all sorts!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You won't be wanting for buns with the plethora here. And greatest of
all, a delight to surpass even carrot bread... Double carrot bread!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wonder which one you'd prefer... I shall bring whatever you like, so
feel free to tell me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You must be famished after roving the grounds in your long search.
I'm certain a hearty meal will put you back in good spirits!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki helps take my mind off everything until the exhaustion
from searching for my badge melts away.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Trainer, is it to your liking?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I took all your interests and likes into account when I chose that
dessert, you know?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Really?! YES! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Pardon me, I was overly excited. Your satisfied face,
though—it fills my heart with joy!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, I'd say you're the kind one for thinking so.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't merely want to spend time together—rather, I wanted to
provide you with a splendidly pleasurable experience.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
For I am Fuji Kiseki—the entertainer who brings joy to all! At least,
that is the ideal I wish to become.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: FUJIII! We've got an emergency! It's horrible!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, Biko! What distresses you so?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It's the dorm TV. It's not working! We all wanna watch the evening
race... What do we do?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, that certainly sounds horrible! Fear not, I'm on my way. You
were right to come find me, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ah! Fuji, there you are!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Come on, the day's so boooring when you're not around! Show us
some cool magic tricks again!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Darling pony, it must be unbearable. Go wait at the dorm. I
shall hurry there in all haste!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I must be off, back to our dormitory. Thank you for a splendid
time!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now then, until we meet again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki flashes a charming smile at me as she heads off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I remember right, she's the leader of Ritto dorm. They must all
depend on her, judging from what I just saw.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki, loved by all, wishes to bring joy to everyone... But I
wonder how she races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before my imagination begins to go wild, I double-check my badge
and head home.
